description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-icon: SVG icon system with sprite support. Load sprite via Drupal libraries.yml; reference by name. Supports inline SVG and external sprite references.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-icon/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Inline SVG and external sprite reference modes
- [ ] Configurable sprite URL
- [ ] Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl
- [ ] Color inherits from currentColor
- [ ] CSS parts: svg
- [ ] Lazy loading for external sprites
- [ ] ARIA: role=img with aria-label, or aria-hidden for decorative
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** medium
title: Implement hx-icon component

statusChangeReason: PR #125 created. Rebased onto dev, remediation counters reset. CI running.

threadFeedback.agentReasoning: Already fixed in Iteration 1 — duplicate `test-results/` entry removed from .gitignore.

Inline styles (`gap: 0.5rem`, `display: flex`) in Storybook story render functions are demo scaffold wrapper divs, not component theming. The `--hx-*` token convention applies to component source (`.styles.ts`), not to layout helpers in story render callbacks. Applying tokens to every story wrapper would reduce readability with zero end-user benefit.

The `var(--hx-size-6, 1.5rem)` rem fallbacks are intentional defensive programming. If consumer environments haven't loaded the token CSS, the component renders at a sensible size. Removing them would cause zero-size icons in token-absent environments. This is a deliberate resilience pattern — the "no hardcoded values" rule targets component property assignments, not final fallbacks in a token cascade chain.
Already fixed in Iteration 1 — all 5 `setTimeout(50)` sleeps replaced with the deterministic `waitForInlineSvg` helper in the sanitizer test block.
Already fixed in Iteration 1 — `forEach` callback converted to block-bodied form to satisfy Biome `useIterableCallbackReturn`.
Already fixed in Iteration 1 — `test-results/.last-run.json` untracked via `git rm --cached`.
